text: I feel a sense of dislocation at first, standing in this stark, angled corridor—with emergency gear on the wall and muted lighting, it feels like a threshold between the ordinary and the unknown. Entering the vibrant R+D exhibit, curiosity grows within me. Here, colors and screens stimulate my thoughts about innovation and the evolving relationship between humans and machines. It is as if I am witnessing the future unfold—and I am both participant and observer, awed by the creativity of human inquiry.
